description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart persists workflow shell environment exports when .workflow/config.yml exists and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions. SubagentStart records spawned Claude subagent identities and injects operator bootstrap context for workflow-operator. PreToolUse protects provider cache issue body projections and tells Claude when an authoring file was already read in the session. PostToolUse records main-session authoring file reads in session state. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext.

hooks.description: Protect provider cache issue body projections from unsafe frontmatter edits
Notify when a workflow authoring file was already read in the session
Record main-session workflow authoring file reads in session state
Record spawned subagent identity and inject workflow operator bootstrap context when applicable
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
